metadata.title: NEVA Studio - Architects in Gijón | Asturias
metadata.description: Architecture studio in Gijón with over 10 years of experience. Residential and commercial projects, renovations and interior design in Asturias.
metadata.keywords: architects gijon, architecture asturias, architecture studio, residential projects, renovations, interior design

hero.description: Our architecture studio is located in Asturias, although we have worked throughout Spain. In our more than 10 years of experience, we have developed a close and humanistic architecture.
hero.description2: We understand that each project is unique and must reflect the desires and needs of our clients, ensuring functionality, comfort and a design of pure, clear and simple lines that makes each space unique.
hero.description3: We are passionate about finding that perfect balance between form and function, both in large residential or commercial projects, as well as in each home, renovation or even interior design that we carry out.

about.title: Architects in Gijón
about.description1: NEVA is an architecture studio, based in Gijón, with more than 10 years of experience in the sector. This has allowed us to develop a way of working that goes beyond architecture, accompanying the client and valuing their opinion at all times.
about.description2: We shape your project so that it adapts to your tastes and needs.
about.subtitle: Architecture services in Asturias
about.description5: We transform your spaces completely, with a sustainable and efficient approach.
about.subtitle2: An architecture studio in Gijón with a humanistic vision
about.description8: Why choose NEVA Studio as your architecture studio in Asturias?

humanist.title: Humanistic architecture
humanist.description: Close approach focused on the user

historia.title: History
historia.paragraph1: Neva are Andrés Suárez and Laín Fernández. We met studying at the School of Architecture in A Coruña. From the first moment friendship arose and we soon saw that we also shared ideas about our profession that fit together.
historia.paragraph2: In 2016 we were granted a scholarship for the Creative Industries Incubator of Matadero, in Madrid. There began a fruitful professional collaboration that, at first, we alternated with work in other architecture studios in Madrid and Asturias.
historia.paragraph3: In 2021, already established in Gijón, we decided to take a step further and create our own brand and studio. Thus Neva was born.

items.title: School of Architecture
items.description: Andrés and Laín meet at the School of Architecture in A Coruña. A friendship is born alongside a shared vision of the profession.

items.title: Matadero Madrid
items.description: Scholarship at the Creative Industries Incubator of Matadero. A professional collaboration begins, alternated with work at other studios.

items.title: First own projects
items.description: First commissions for single-family homes and rehabilitation in Asturias and León. Casa RDV and Extension BR mark the beginning.

items.title: NEVA is born
items.description: Established in Gijón, they create their own brand and studio. NEVA is born with a clear philosophy: close and humanistic architecture.

items.title: Growth
items.description: The studio grows with residential, commercial and rehabilitation projects across Spain. Wefreak in Madrid, Río Trubia, Poniente Beach.

items.title: Present
items.description: Over 14 built projects. NEVA establishes itself as a reference for close architecture in Asturias.

porque.title: Why 'Neva'
porque.definition: nevar: v. Snow fell [from the clouds]
porque.explanation: When snow covers the valley or the mountain, it creates a blank canvas on which any idea is possible, awakening inspiration. A canvas, however, whose visual grandeur, calm and serenity invite respect: what we create there must be up to the task.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Discover some of our most outstanding projects. Each one represents our commitment to architectural excellence and client satisfaction.

casa-rdv.title: Casa RDV
casa-rdv.description: Modern single-family home with sustainable design
casa-rdv.detailedDescription:
A young couple commissioned a home for everyday use. It would be the home of their future family, so they needed at least three bedrooms. They had the dream of incorporating a dressing room and bathroom in the master bedroom. They asked us for a pantry and a laundry room attached to the kitchen, two very useful spaces for daily life. They also wanted a large covered outdoor porch, allowing them to spend time outdoors. Given the location, they needed a garage for two vehicles.

To accommodate all these requests, we designed a play of orthogonal volumes on two levels, with an additional module for the garage. This allowed us to cantilever one volume over another, creating a covered entrance to the home.

On the ground floor we placed the daytime and guest areas (kitchen, living room, bathroom and a bedroom/study). On the upper floor we located the private rooms (master suite, two double bedrooms, a bathroom and even a comfortable multipurpose room).

We combined stone and two-tone mortar finishes (black and white) to achieve a contemporary yet welcoming visual appearance.

casa-nvp.title: Casa NVP
casa-nvp.description: Contemporary architecture integrated into the landscape
casa-nvp.detailedDescription: This single-family home represents a perfect example of contemporary architecture that harmoniously integrates with the Asturian landscape. The design respects the terrain's topography while maximizing views and natural light. The materials used reflect local tradition adapted to modern construction techniques, creating a space that is both functional and aesthetically striking.

loft-rural.title: Rural Loft
loft-rural.description: Rural space rehabilitation with industrial design
loft-rural.detailedDescription: Transformation of a traditional rural space into a modern loft with industrial aesthetics. The project maintains the original structure while incorporating contemporary and functional elements. The result is a versatile space that combines the warmth of original materials with the functionality of modern design.

ampliacion-br.title: Extension BR
ampliacion-br.description: Single-family home extension with views of Sierra del Sueve
ampliacion-br.detailedDescription: Single-family home extension adding a triple bedroom and living room on the ground floor, plus a private area on the first floor with a living room, bedroom with dressing room and bathroom. The new volume faces south to maximize sunlight and views toward Sierra del Sueve, covered with a four-slope roof matching the home's aesthetic. White render forms the building envelope, with slate roofing matching existing materials.

ampliacion-vll.title: Extension VLL
ampliacion-vll.detailedDescription: Carefully designed extension that maintains the essence of the original architecture while incorporating modern solutions. The project demonstrates how it is possible to expand an existing home without compromising its architectural character, creating additional spaces that integrate perfectly with the original structure.

reforma-ol.title: Renovation OL
reforma-ol.detailedDescription: Complete renovation that fully transforms the interior space, optimizing the layout and improving functionality. The project includes personalized interior design that reflects the inhabitants' lifestyle, creating a modern and welcoming home.

poniente-playa.title: Poniente Beach
poniente-playa.description: Change of use from commercial to accessible dwelling
poniente-playa.detailedDescription: Conversion of a commercial space into a dwelling with a minimal program and open plan, with a single compartmentalized bathroom. The bedroom is located at the rear for reduced noise, while the living-dining-kitchen area occupies the front near the entrance. A transparent transitional portal connects exterior and interior, maximizing natural light through dual opposing facades with translucent glazing.

pie-playa.title: At the Beach
pie-playa.description: Change of use from commercial to coastal residence
pie-playa.detailedDescription: Change of use project converting a commercial space into a residential dwelling in Gijón. A design that makes the most of the available space to create a functional and bright home by the beach.

reforma-ra.title: Reforma RA
reforma-ra.detailedDescription: Renovation of a commercial space seeking to optimize space utilization and storage capacity after more than 25 years of operation. The project relocates the interior staircase from the back to the double-height space, transforming it into a sculptural element. This frees up storage and workshop areas. The mezzanine's dividing wall is removed to restore the original single-space storage, revealing the original wrought iron pillars.

wefreak.title: Wefreak
wefreak.description: Interior design for toy store chain in Madrid
wefreak.detailedDescription: Renovation and interior design of two commercial spaces for a toy store chain in Madrid. The design follows the established brand identity: simple design with minimal elements, maintaining corporate colors. The main space features an open layout with light colors, functional white furniture without ornaments, and black and gold accents for singular elements and signage. Lighting combines main illumination with indirect LED or Neon-LED strips serving a decorative function.

rio-trubia.title: Río Trubia
rio-trubia.detailedDescription: Adaptation of an existing commercial space for a veterinary center in Trubia, Asturias. The project transforms a commercial space into a functional and welcoming veterinary center, adapting the layout to the specific needs of veterinary practice.

candanal.title: Candanal
candanal.detailedDescription: Residential rehabilitation project that completely renovates a home in Candanal, Asturias. The intervention respects the original structure while incorporating contemporary interior design, creating modern and functional spaces.

fachada-ac.title: Fachada AC
fachada-ac.description: Facade rehabilitation with decorative HPL panels
fachada-ac.detailedDescription: Minimal intervention on the facade of an existing residence in Salinas, Asturias. The project aims to address defects, renew materials and give the home a fresh appearance. Surfaces are homogenized by removing existing moldings, decorative HPL lattice panels are installed on the second-floor facade, and wooden shutters are placed to match the overall color palette.

playa-8.title: Playa 8
playa-8.detailedDescription: Facade rehabilitation project for a building in Gijón. The intervention renews the building's exterior image while improving its energy efficiency and visual appearance.

services.description: We design spaces that improve your daily life.
services.subtitle: In over 10 years of experience we have developed a human and close architecture, adapting each project to the needs of the people.
services.subtitle2: We work in our studio in Asturias and design comfortable, practical and inspiring spaces.

features: Change of use from commercial to residential

commercial.title: Commercial
commercial.description: We work to boost businesses, adapting to the needs of each brand or client.

urbanism.title: Urban planning
urbanism.description: We develop urban plans and specific subdivision and urbanization projects, as well as allegations and suggestions to General Plans.

energy.title: Energy rehabilitation
energy.description: Energy efficiency is part of our commitment. We improve the thermal envelope of buildings to increase comfort and reduce energy consumption.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: We provide the technical documentation and certifications necessary for any technical work.

other.title: Other projects
other.description: At Neva studio we offer solutions in all areas of architecture.

turnkey.title: Turnkey
turnkey.description: We comprehensively manage all project phases, from start to final delivery. Our goal is to simplify the process for the client, organizing and coordinating the various procedures and agents.

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose Neva Studio as your architecture studio in Asturias?

experience.title: Experience and professionalism
experience.description: The architects that make up Neva have extensive experience in projects of different scales throughout Spain. Whatever your need, do not hesitate to consult us.

personalized.title: Personalized approach
personalized.description: Our first step is always to get to know our clients and understand what they are looking for. This personalized approach allows us to adapt each project to your specific needs.

commitment.title: Commitment to success
commitment.description: Our goal is to exceed our clients' expectations in each project. At Neva Studio we are committed to success and work to offer quality results.

versatility.title: Versatility and adaptability
versatility.description: If something defines our team of architects in Gijón it is their versatility and adaptability, which allow us to respond to any project, regardless of its size or complexity.

contact.title: Neva Studio, the architects in Asturias who best adapt to you
contact.description1: We get completely involved with each client to offer them the best possible project and design together that unique space they imagine.
contact.description2: Visit our projects section to see how we have achieved this with the clients who already trusted us.
contact.description3: If you are looking for close, current and made-to-measure architecture, do not hesitate to contact us.

success.title: Message sent!
